name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Sacramento's 12th Street Western Union Money Order Only location provides money order services 7 days a week, 8AM-8PM, for CA residents.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 402 12th St in Sacramento, CA operates as a standalone check-cashing and money order facility. Located in downtown Sacramento on a busy commercial street, this branch is open seven days a week from 8AM to 8PM, making it accessible for both weekday and weekend transactions.

This Sacramento location specializes in money order services with professional staff trained to handle cash exchanges and wire transaction needs. For specific questions about rates, available services, or transaction limits, call +1 916-444-2515. The store accepts proper identification and handles all transactions securely.

Sacramento residents can use this 12th Street location for quick money orders when banks aren't available or during extended evening hours. Bring your government-issued ID and cash for fastest service. Whether you need to pay rent, send funds to family, or handle urgent financial obligations, Western Union Money Order Only provides accessible service in central Sacramento.
pros: 1,700+ agent locations embedded in Walmart, grocery stores, and retail chains nationwide for high accessibility
Money orders offered as check alternative at participating locations, useful for recipients without bank accounts
Hybrid online + in-person model allows customers to initiate transfers online and pay cash at counter to save time
International transfers with automatic currency conversion and delivery in recipient's local currency
MTCN tracking system lets both sender and recipient independently monitor transfer status
Bill payment services available (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating agent locations
Operates since 1851 with established fraud prevention and encryption for transaction security
Prepaid Visa card option for receiving money without minimum balance or credit check requirement
cons: Fees for in-person transfers typically higher than digital-only money transfer competitors
Agent location hours vary by host store with no unified operating hours across network
Does not provide currency exchange at physical locations, only through transfer mechanism
Website content does not disclose specific fee amounts or pricing transparency upfront
Limited payment method flexibility—credit cards accepted only at select locations, not all
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who conduct financial transactions entirely in cash
International money senders who need reliable cash delivery in recipient's home currency
Consumers needing to send money orders to recipients without bank accounts
Customers in underserved areas with convenient access through Walmart or grocery store locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers without traditional bank access who need reliable in-person money transfer and bill payment services, particularly those sending money internationally. The main caveat is that fees are substantially higher than digital alternatives, making it cost-effective primarily for occasional use or situations where physical cash transfer is essential.
services: Domestic in-person money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with currency conversion
Money order purchase and cashing at participating locations
Cash pickup for funds sent by others using MTCN
Bill payment (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating agent locations
Online transfer initiation with in-person payment completion
Western Union mobile app for transfer management
Prepaid Visa card money receipt option
MTCN tracking system for transfer status monitoring
Credit card payment option at select locations
Cash payment option for all transactions
meta_description: Western Union Money Order Only at 402 12th St, Sacramento, CA. Money orders 8AM-8PM daily, 7 days a week.
